headline: Morgan Stanley turns cautious on freight stocks despite stronger cycle outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley downgraded its view on the North American freight transportation sector to "In-Line" from "Attractive", arguing that while the industry's cyclical recovery is strengthening, much of the upside has already been reflected in stock prices amid record valuations.

headline: What You Need To Know Ahead of Old Dominion Freight's Earnings Release
summary: Old Dominion Freight is set to announce its second-quarter earnings this month, and Wall Street expects a double-digit rise in its profits.

headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades Old Dominion Freight Line to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $245
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ravi Shanker   downgrades Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $235 to $245.
